item.title: F-036c: iPad Pointer and Trackpad Support
item.intent: iPad with trackpad should feel like a desktop app — hover states, right-click menus, precise cursor placement
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-003 (Core Rendering), FEAT-005 (Doctor). Full trackpad and mouse support via UIPointerInteraction. Hover states on: toolbar buttons, doctor indicators, AI action bar items, links, settings controls. Right-click context menu with: Cut, Copy, Paste, AI actions (if text selected), Look Up. Pointer automatically switches between arrow (UI) and I-beam (text) based on target. Smooth pointer acceleration.
acceptanceCriteria: Hovering over a toolbar button shows a highlight/tooltip
Hovering over a doctor indicator shows the issue preview
Right-clicking selected text shows context menu with AI actions
Pointer changes from arrow to I-beam when entering the text editing area
